scenarios.name: generate-2-bedroom-apartment
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but fails the 10% window area requirement for some rooms, while Response B lacks key specifications such as ceiling height, wall thickness, door dimensions, and window area details.

scenarios.name: validate-floor-plan
scenarios.rationale: Response B addresses all rubric items with specific calculations, while Response A misses several key requirements and provides incomplete stair geometry.
